# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.101 — Personalized License Plates

The department shall issue personalized license plates, including those sold by the private vendor under a contract with the department as provided by Section 504.851 (Contract with Private Vendor) .

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 176, eff. January 1, 2012.*
